---
title: "muninn_memory.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/muninn_memory.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.00
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 7.11
overall_score: 6.22
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MuninnMemory, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import MuninnMemory and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [datetime](file://datetime)

### Exports
- `MuninnMemory`
- `__init__`
- `load_ledger`
- `record_trace`
